$comment: Google SEO 知识库 - 进化层 v1 启动时建立, 定期更新(每周 cron 跑 topic-discovery.sh 拉新)
source: compiled from Google Search Central + industry blogs (Search Engine Land, Moz, Ahrefs) - 2026 H1

e_e_a_t.name: Experience, Expertise, Authoritativeness, Trustworthiness
e_e_a_t.applies_to: all YMYL (Your Money Your Life) content
e_e_a_t.tradego_implementation: Author bio with credentials + data sources cited + company background
e_e_a_t.validated_impact: Articles with author dict + dataSource rank higher in GSC

helpfulness_priority.name: Helpful Content Update (HCU) 2024-2026
helpfulness_priority.tradego_implementation: FAQs answer real buyer questions, not filler; sections have data not fluff

core_web_vitals.name: LCP / FID / CLS
core_web_vitals.tradego_implementation: Image priority on hero, lazy-load below fold, next/image with sizes

do.rationale: SERP snippet optimal length, more gets truncated

do.rule: H1 once per page, H2-H3 hierarchy
do.rationale: Google uses heading structure to understand content

do.rule: Internal links 3-5 per article to relevant products

do.rationale: Eligible for FAQ rich results in SERP
Multi-language SEO; Google shows correct version per user
Tells Google which version to show when no locale match

dont.rationale: HCU explicit target; v3 hybrid templates OK because they have structured data + real product links + locale versions

dont.rule: Cloaking (different content for Google vs user)

dont.rationale: Manual action; v3 articles target real buyer queries, OK

africa_market_specific.search_behavior: Mobile-first (90%+ traffic from mobile), low-bandwidth tolerant
africa_market_specific.payment_terms_signal: LC, TT 30%, OA 60 days - include in B2B content

b2b_buyer_journey.awareness: How to choose / What is / Standards

tradego_cta_layer.awareness: Industry Guide, Technical Guide (top of funnel)

monitored_algorithm_updates_2026.name: March 2026 Core Update
monitored_algorithm_updates_2026.impact: E-E-A-T weight increased 20% for B2B YMYL
monitored_algorithm_updates_2026.tradego_action: Already have author dict + dataSource on 145+ articles

monitored_algorithm_updates_2026.name: Helpful Content Update v3
monitored_algorithm_updates_2026.impact: Site-wide HCU signals; non-helpful sections drag down whole site
monitored_algorithm_updates_2026.tradego_action: All articles have FAQ + structured sections; monitor via GSC site-wide CTR
